title: Jakarta Heat Wave
lead: Jakarta is experiencing a severe heat wave with a Z-Score of +3.26. The city's heat wave has reached a critical level with a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current weather conditions in Jakarta are characterized by high temperatures and high humidity, with an average relative humidity of 79%. 
 The heat wave is expected to continue, with a Cooling Degree Day (CDD) of 10.4 GG, indicating a high energy demand for cooling. 
 The wind speed is relatively low, at 3.5 km/h, which can exacerbate the heat island effect in urban areas.
conclusion: Implement emergency heat wave protocols immediately.
